author: bridge-bot
content: <yorickdowne> Did you even try to Google that? Bang this into a Google search prompt: “which version of tls supports quantum resistant algorithms?”

author: sky.cactus
content: My trust of the people in this room is much higher than my trust of Google results these days.  That being said, you are right that this is probably something more appropriate for an LLM chat, so I'll follow-up there.
